This '''monkey''' was a small creature from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Cophrigin V]]. One of these creatures was in the company of an exiled [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[The Dark Woman|An'ya Kuro]], when [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] [[Duel on Cophrigin V|arrived]] on the planet to eliminate her in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
As no official name has been given to these creatures, they are conjecturally named for their [[Wikipedia:Simian|simian]]-like appearance.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|issue1=1|issue2=2|Extinction}} {{1st}}
